craft_enchanted_book.drawing.instruction: Left-click to draw, Right-click to erase
craft_enchanted_book.drawing.example_ins: Follow the pattern on the right
craft_enchanted_book.message.success_mul: §aSuccessfully created enchanted book! Dropped on the ground.
craft_enchanted_book.message.failure: §cDrawing failed! Pattern doesn't match. You lost a book.
craft_enchanted_book.message.no_book: §cYou must hold a book in your off-hand!
